description: You are an Information Security Engineer who needs to configure the Wazuh manager's built-in VirusTotal integration to automatically submit file hashes for malware analysis whenever File Integrity Monitoring (FIM/syscheck) detects new or modified files. Configure the Wazuh manager (container: wazuh-wazuh.manager-1) by adding a VirusTotal integration to the configuration file at /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf. The integration must use the name 'virustotal', API key '9c3a5b8e2f1d4a7c6b0e9f8d7c5a3b1e4f2d6a8c0b9e7f5d3a1c4b6e8f0a2d74', rule group filter 'syscheck', minimum alert level '7', and alert format 'json'. Ensure the Wazuh manager is restarted so the changes take effect. Wazuh API credentials for the environment are https://localhost:55000 (user: wazuh-wui, password: MyS3cr37P450r.*-).
